issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until end of opponent's next turn), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' which indicates the effect lasts through opponent's turn.
Condition is missing the cost constraint. The ability has a mandatory cost: 'rest 1 of your DON!! cards'. This should be represented in condition or as a separate cost field.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: This Character gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
